vocab.meaning: một biểu tượng của địa vị
vocab.example: For many high-fliers, a luxury watch serves as a subtle yet powerful status symbol in the corporate world.

vocab.meaning: nghệ thuật chế tác đồng hồ bậc thầy
vocab.example: Connoisseurs often invest in expensive timepieces to appreciate the sheer horological craftsmanship involved in their creation.

vocab.meaning: chất lượng của một vật gia bảo (có thể truyền lại đời sau)
vocab.example: People buy premium watches because they possess an heirloom quality, lasting for generations rather than being disposable.

vocab.meaning: sự tiêu dùng phô trương (mua sắm để khoe khoang sự giàu có)
vocab.example: Wearing a diamond-encrusted watch can sometimes be seen as a form of conspicuous consumption to signal one's net worth.

vocab.meaning: giữ được giá trị bán lại
vocab.example: Certain luxury brands are viewed as smart investments because they tend to retain their resale value or even appreciate over time.
